stemHtml:
You are planning to fly at FL160 at 0700Z through an area covered by the following SIGMET:

WSEG12 LFPW 200358
LFPW SIGMET 01 VALID 200400/200800
LFPW-LFBB FIR: Severe mountain waves observed from 48N00W to 48N06W, moving east at 20 knots, between FL100 and FL200. Intensity increasing.

Based on this information, which of the following weather phenomena should you expect during your flight?
